title: Add new attorney
description:
Please add their new attorney.
https://www.fieldinglaw.com/meet-the-team/

Name: Thompson Du 
Title: Attorney

Bio:
Thompson Du is a personal injury attorney who represents clients at every stage of their case—from pre-litigation investigation and negotiation through litigation, mediation, and trial. He is known for building trial-ready cases early, allowing him to secure strong pre-suit resolutions while remaining fully prepared to litigate when necessary.
Thompson has successfully handled cases from intake through verdict, serving as first-chair trial counsel in multiple matters and obtaining plaintiff’s verdicts. He has also secured six-figure recoveries, including cases initially viewed as low potential, through meticulous case development, strategic negotiation, and disciplined advocacy.
His practice includes personally handling hearings and mediations statewide, drafting and arguing dispositive and discovery motions, and developing record-supported briefing to defend trial-court rulings, including a response to a petition for writ of mandamus. Thompson litigates cases throughout Texas and is licensed to practice law in Texas and Oklahoma, as well as in the United States District Courts for the Northern and Eastern Districts of Texas.
 
Thompson was recognized among the Top 100 Personal Injury Verdicts in Texas (2024) and was selected as a CLE panelist for the Dallas Bar Association, where he talked about mediation strategy. He has developed a strong referral-based practice, earning the trust of attorneys and professionals who rely on him to manage cases efficiently and drive results.
 
Before joining Fielding Law, Thompson practiced as a personal injury attorney at a prominent Texas firm, where he handled both pre-litigation and litigation matters, resolved cases, tried cases as first chair, and trained and supervised junior attorneys. He also gained valuable prosecutorial perspective as a post-bar intern with the Dallas County District Attorney’s Office.
 
Thompson earned his Juris Doctor from the University of North Texas at Dallas College of Law, graduating Top 5% of his class, and completed his undergraduate studies at the University of North Texas, graduating Summa Cum Laude.
He is a member of the Dallas Asian American Bar Association, the Texas Trial Lawyers Association, and the Texas Bar College.
 
Outside of work, Thompson enjoys playing league and pickup basketball, working out, and spending time with his wife and their two dogs, Clyde and Ralph.

Thanks

title: Add new attorney - Nijyar H Tovi
description:
Seeking help add their new attorney please.
https://www.fieldinglaw.com/meet-the-team/

Add her between Bret and Nancy:

Nijyar Tovi
Associate Attorney 

Bio:
Nijyar H. Tovi is an Associate Attorney at Fielding Law, where he is dedicated to helping individuals who have been injured through no fault of their own. Deeply rooted in the Dallas–Fort Worth community, Nijyar brings a client-focused approach that combines compassion, diligence, and clear communication at every stage of a case.

Before joining Fielding Law, Nijyar earned his Juris Doctor Cum Laude from UNT Dallas College of Law, where he was consistently recognized on the Dean’s List and received the CALI Award for excellence in Legal Research. During law school, he interned at Legal Aid of Northwest Texas, providing direct legal assistance to underserved clients and collaborating with supervising attorneys on strategy and case preparation. This experience strengthened his commitment to accessible, client-centered advocacy and gave him a firsthand understanding of the challenges injured individuals face navigating the legal system.

Prior to his legal career, Nijyar gained more than a decade of management and insurance experience, including roles as a General Manager in the service industry, insurance Claims Adjuster, and as an Agency Producer with a Texas insurance agency. These positions refined his leadership, negotiation, and problem-solving skills—qualities he now applies to achieving fair results for his clients.

A lifelong Texan, Nijyar lives in Collin County with his wife and their two children.

Outside the office, he enjoys coaching youth soccer, volunteering with the North Texas Food Bank, listening to podcasts, and cheering on his kids at the soccer field.

title: Invoice Question
description:
, , - Please review the recent email regarding the client's question about the invoice.

The client conducted an audit and identified some overpayments to us from March 2025 to March 2026. 

They mentioned that they closed the Utah office in February 2025, but they kept paying $16,500 each month. They think that after the office was closed, that amount should have dropped to $8,250. 

They think they overpaid $8,250 per month for 13 months, totaling $107,250. 

Could we review their account and confirm if they get a credit for that amount? 

Once the next steps are identified , please close out this task and let me know if any further action is needed on my part. 

Thanks.

title: Richardson Page edit
assignees: Den, Evgenii Gusarovskii, Jordan, Mary De Guzman, Predrag
description:
Hi Mary,

I cannot edit the content blocks on https://www.fieldinglaw.com/personal-injury/richardson/.

Could a dev add the following content in the following spots?



At Fielding Law, it’s not about our accolades, it’s about your recovery. As your dedicated Richardson, TX personal injury lawyers, we understand that a serious accident on US-75 or a collision near the CityLine development can leave you feeling overwhelmed and uncertain. Our mission is to serve as your local legal advocates, navigating the complexities of Texas insurance claims so you don’t have to. We help accident victims in Richardson by aggressively pursuing maximum compensation for medical expenses, lost wages, and long-term rehabilitation costs.


From our office on Lakeside Blvd, our team provides the personalized attention of a "neighborly" firm backed by the resources of a powerhouse practice. Whether you’ve suffered a car wreck, a slip and fall, or a workplace injury, Fielding Law handles the heavy lifting, investigating the scene, gathering evidence, and negotiating with adjusters, to ensure you receive the justice you deserve.

==========================



You have enough to manage without worrying about legal costs. As leading Richardson, TX personal injury attorneys, Fielding Law operates on a contingency fee basis, you don’t pay a dime unless we win compensation for you. Our Richardson personal injury law firm is dedicated to your recovery, providing elite representation with zero upfront fees. Rest easy; we're on your team.


Thank you.

Here is the schema:

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@graph": [
{
"@type": "WebPage",
"@id": "<URL of case type>#webpage",
"url": "<URL of case type>",
"name": "<SEO Title from Yoast>",
"description": "<SEO description from Yoast>",
"breadcrumb": { "@id": "<URL of case type>#breadcrumb" },

}
},
"mentions": [
{
"@type": "City",
"name": "Richardson, Texas",
"sameAs": "https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q128375"
}
]
},
{
"@type": "BreadcrumbList",
"@id": "<URL of case type>#breadcrumb",
"itemListElement": [
{
"@type": "ListItem",
"position": 1,
"name": "Home",
"item": "https://www.fieldinglaw.com/"

]

]
}

title: Include Sitemap In footer of Client websites
description:
Hi, this is inline with previous task - Include Sitemap In footer of Client websites - J389 Go Arco

Here is a sheet we can also use for reference: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qPfUUC1J2r1s7Ot8Y1PmIcje6WpyMszDhxHGz4TxDTk/edit?gid=0#gid=0

SEO added more info column D. 

I have included the task info here:
--- 
Hey Team!

To enhance our technical SEO baseline, improve crawl efficiency, and ensure consistent signaling across all client properties, It would be great to come to an agreement to outlining a new, standardized protocol for crawl management.

My suggestion is as follows:

Implement the following three directives on all client websites as part of our standard build and maintenance process.

1. XML Sitemap in robots.txt (Primary Directive)

This is the most effective way to inform search engines of all indexable URLs.

Action: Ensure the robots.txt file for every client domain contains a Sitemap directive pointing to the full URL of the XML sitemap.

Implementation Example:
User-agent: 
Sitemap: https://www.clientdomain.com/sitemap.xml

The "Why": This provides a clear, direct path for Google to find and crawl our most important pages, ensuring faster discovery and indexing of new content.

2. User-Facing HTML Sitemap (Footer)

This is for user experience and secondary crawl pathing.

Action: All client websites must have a user-facing HTML sitemap.

Implementation: This sitemap must be linked in the footer of every page on the site.

The "Why": This provides a clear navigation path for users, improves site accessibility, and   acts as a secondary crawl path for search engines to discover deep pages.

Strategic Crawl & Indexation Control

This is critical. We must be precise in telling crawlers what to crawl and what to index.

A. To Control Crawling (Using robots.txt)

We must Disallow crawlers from accessing low-value, non-SEO pages to conserve crawl budget.

Action: Audit and update the robots.txt file to Disallow non-public or utility sections of the site.
Implementation Examples:
Disallow: /wp-admin/

The WP sitemap page  plugin in perfect to use as a plugin for now

Regarding providing a robot.txt:

They differ per client especially regarding disallows but here is a comprehensive one that can be edited according to client needs especially regarding disallows:

User-agent: *

# --- Core WordPress File Disallows ---
# Block all core administrative and include folders.
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-includes/

# --- Crawl Budget Optimization ---
# Block non-media plugin and theme files from being crawled.
Disallow: /wp-content/plugins/
Disallow: /wp-content/themes/

# Block internal search result pages, which are low-quality, duplicate content.
Disallow: /?s=
Disallow: /search/

# Block other non-public WordPress files and pages.
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /readme.html
Disallow: /trackback/
Disallow: /xmlrpc.php

# --- Allow Directives for Critical Files ---
# Explicitly ALLOW critical AJAX and asset files that Google
# may need for rendering, even if their parent folder is disallowed.
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php
Allow: /wp-content/uploads/

# --- Sitemap Directive ---
# This is the primary directive to tell all search engines where our XML sitemap is located.
# [IMPORTANT: Replace with the client's actual sitemap URL]
Sitemap: https://www.clientdomain.com/sitemap_index.xml

Also, just an example of placement. Sitemap listed at the very bottom of the footer on the left followed by privacy policy etc.

* In the footer we will use the page /sitemap/ and not the XML sitemap.  The XML sitemap is for Google & the robots.txt.


you can use this as robots.txt:
 
User-agent: *

# --- Core WordPress File Disallows ---
# Block all core administrative and include folders.
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-includes/

# --- Crawl Budget Optimization ---
# Block non-media plugin and theme files from being crawled.
Disallow: /wp-content/plugins/
Disallow: /wp-content/themes/

# Block internal search result pages, which are low-quality, duplicate content.
Disallow: /?s=
Disallow: /search/

# Block other non-public WordPress files and pages.
Disallow: /wp-login.php
Disallow: /readme.html
Disallow: /trackback/
Disallow: /xmlrpc.php

# --- Allow Directives for Critical Files ---
# Explicitly ALLOW critical AJAX and asset files that Google 
# may need for rendering, even if their parent folder is disallowed.
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php
Allow: /wp-content/uploads/

# --- Sitemap Directive ---
# This is the primary directive to tell all search engines where our XML sitemap is located.
# [IMPORTANT: Replace with the client's actual sitemap URL]
Sitemap: https://www.goarco.com/sitemap_index.xml

Thanks much!

At Fielding Law, we understand the dangers riders face and the severe injuries these accidents can cause. If you or a loved one has been in a motorcycle accident, our experienced attorneys are here to fight for the compensation you deserve. Contact us today!
#MotorcycleAccidents #SevereInjuries #LegalRepresentation #FieldingLaw

title: Update Fielding's webform
description:
From Stefanie:
  • Houston we have an issue – a BIG issue – the Federal Govt has mandated all companies using SMS to contact clients, must adhere to certain standards for them to allow the platform to be used through software companies i.e., Zoom, Ring Central, etc. Well – we have been rejected 3x so far for the license, and they are getting ready to pull our SMS capabilities (insert my freak out moment), this is the latest information I have received which we must implement ASAP to make it happen:
    • Webform “Contact Us” section, we need to have wording that states: “By providing a telephone number and submitting this form you are consenting to be contacted by SMS text message. Message & data rates may apply. You can reply STOP to opt-out of further messaging.”
  • Lastly, please reiterate that statement in our Privacy Policy Sections of our website: https://www.fieldinglaw.com/disclaimer/
CC:

title: Blog Fielding Law - October 24, 2023
assignees: Bogdan Zakharchyshyn, Den, Jordan, Keith Bruss, Predrag, Venus Saragena
description:
Please see new blog post below for Fielding Law:
 
Fielding Law Personal Injury Attorneys: A Firm with a Difference
 
In a world of clamorous personal injury commercials, flashy billboards, and relentless legal advertising, it can often feel as though the entire personal injury landscape is reduced to a single mantra: money, money, money. But there is one firm that stands out distinctly in this crowd, striving to make a difference for every client they represent – Fielding Law Personal Injury Attorneys.
 
Prioritizing Client Savings Over Profits
 
At the heart of Fielding Law, there's an unwavering belief that the needs of the client always come first. While every law firm needs to make a profit to stay afloat, Fielding Law stands out by being fiercely committed to saving clients' money. While other firms might settle quickly to move onto the next case, Fielding Law is dedicated to ensuring that clients receive maximum compensation without unnecessary costs.
 
Reducing Medical Bills: A Personal Mission
 
Accidents can happen in the blink of an eye, but their financial repercussions can last a lifetime. Medical bills, often inflated and overwhelming, can become a significant burden for accident victims. At Fielding Law, there’s an intensive focus on working relentlessly to bring down these medical bills. Through skilled negotiations with healthcare providers and insurers, the firm works to reduce or even eliminate some of these medical expenses, ensuring clients aren't burdened with insurmountable debt.
 
A Holistic Approach to Client Service
 
While many personal injury firms are eager to flaunt their victory statistics and high-dollar settlements, Fielding Law places emphasis on the holistic well-being of their clients. Their lawyers understand that winning a lawsuit isn't just about the money—it's about helping clients find closure, heal, and move forward. It’s a comprehensive approach that takes into account the emotional, physical, and financial toll of an accident.
 
Transparent Communication and Ethical Practices
 
Fielding Law is built on the pillars of transparency and ethics. Clients are kept in the loop at every stage, ensuring they are fully aware of the proceedings, potential outcomes, and strategies being employed. There are no hidden fees or charges, and every decision made is with the best interest of the client in mind.
 
A Record of Excellence and Trust
 
Fielding Law has consistently demonstrated excellence in their field. But more than just victories in the courtroom, the firm has built an enviable reputation for trust. Their countless testimonials from satisfied clients speak to their dedication, skill, and the genuine care they extend to every individual they represent.
 
In Conclusion
 
In an industry where the dollar sign often overshadows genuine client care, Fielding Law Personal Injury Attorneys stands as a beacon of hope. Their unwavering commitment to client savings, dedication to reducing medical bills, and holistic approach to service underscores the fact that in the legal arena, there's a firm that truly believes in putting people over profits.
 
If you're seeking representation that truly prioritizes your well-being, both financially and emotionally, then look no further than Fielding Law. They're not just attorneys; they're your advocates, dedicated to fighting for your rights and ensuring you get the justice you deserve.

Behind The Lens at Fielding Law: A Glimpse of Our All-Star Team
 
Today, we peel back the curtains to let you in on what makes Fielding Law truly special. It's not just about legal expertise or the number of cases we've won. It's about the people who passionately devote their time, talent, and energy to ensure justice is served. With the masterful skills of our professional photographer, Stacey Fielding, we're thrilled to offer you an exclusive look into the everyday heroes of our firm.
 
1. Paralegals: The Unsung Heroes
In every captivating image, you'll see our paralegals deep in concentration, weaving through vast amounts of data and details with precision. They're the backbone of our operation, ensuring everything runs smoothly. From organizing files to preparing for court proceedings, their dedication is evident, making them indispensable to our firm.
 
2. Attorneys: Defenders of Justice
Each photograph of our attorneys paints a picture of dedication. Be it in the courtroom, at the negotiation table, or strategizing in the office, their unwavering commitment to our clients' rights shines through. With every case, they bring a mix of skill, knowledge, and a fierce drive to make a difference.
 
3. A Tight-Knit Family
What Stacey brilliantly captures is the camaraderie among our team. We laugh, brainstorm, and support one another, making the atmosphere at Fielding Law more familial than corporate. This bond translates to how we approach each case – with unified effort and collaboration.
 
A Heartfelt Thanks to Stacey
 
We cannot express enough gratitude to Stacey Fielding. Through her lens, she hasn't just taken photographs; she's told our story. Her ability to spotlight the genuine moments of dedication, joy, and determination is unparalleled.
 
Your Team, Your Champions
 
At Fielding Law, we understand that navigating the legal landscape can be daunting. That's why, when you choose us, you're not just hiring a lawyer; you're enlisting a team ready to fight tooth and nail for you. As you browse through these candid shots, remember that each face, each smile, each focused gaze is a testament to the lengths we go for our clients.
 
So, here's a toast to the heroes of Fielding Law, the individuals who embody our values and drive our success. Cheers to the champions who work tirelessly behind the scenes, ensuring justice is not just a word, but a reality for our clients.
 
Fielding Law: More than just a firm, a family dedicated to you.

title: Reviews Sldier
description:
Here are some additional reviews for the slider:

This is the most amazing law firm I could have ever imagined working with! They are as honest as they come, always keep you updated, and do whatever it takes to get you the best possible settlement. I will always recommend Fielding Law to anyone who needs an auto accident attorney. Thank you especially to Brian and Phil they are so kind and truly the best!
-Emilie Anderson

Throughout my case, Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys were professional, honest, and determined to see it through in the most efficient way possible. They fought for me and my case was a success. If you have been wrongfully injured, I highly advise you to contact Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys.
-Henry Allen

We were unsure of what to do after my wife was involved in a car accident. We probably would have accepted the insurance company's settlement in its entirety. Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys, however, were a lifesaver when we contacted them. walked us through every step with ease, put us in touch with helpful doctors, and was able to secure a favorable settlement for us..
-Randy Mills

We used Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys in our accident case. These guys are knowledgeable and always willing to go to bat for us and our children. It was such a terrible thing that happened to my child by no fault of his own or mine. We were very lucky to have such a great representation to help fight for our baby and what happened to him and all the other little ones involved.
-Noemy King

You should work with Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys, in my opinion. They looked after my case and I very well. They provided frequent updates, the settlement process moved along quickly, and they stood their ground when it came to negotiating with the insurance provider. I would keep using them if I ever required their services again.
-Gary Perry

I've never been in this scenario before. I found myself in the hospital after I was involved in a truck accident; I didn't know what to do or how I was going to live, but from the moment I came into the office of Fielding Law Auto Accident Attorneys, they made me feel at ease and cared for. I recommend them to anyone who requires the services of an attorney.
-Susan Donald

title: New employee...
description:
No image as yet. I was keeping this until we got one but time is dragging on so we will have to get this page created and just wait for the image. Apologies for that but there isn't much more I can do.

---------------

Jessica joined the firm in October 2022 as a paralegal.
Jessica began her legal career in 2016, where she was a receptionist/intake specialist and worked up to a paralegal. From there, she has practiced different types of law, learning as she goes. She found her passion in helping people who have been injured or otherwise had their life devastated by the reckless conduct of corporations or others. Jessica is dedicated to talking to people and meeting them on an emotional level to help them get through what may be one of the most difficult times in their life. Jessica is also bilingual in Spanish, speaking, reading, and writing bringing an added benefit to our Hispanic clients. In her spare time, Jessica enjoys traveling, cooking, working out, reading, and spending time with friends and family.

title: Please add this settlement to the site...
description:
We referred out a case to BAS Lawyers (Tim Ochsenbein).  It was a big motorcycle commercial accident that had disputed liability facts.
 
BAS Lawyers took it to trial and won a $5M+ verdict – but 40% fault was allocated to our client.
 
Refer here to their website’s references to the case:
 
https://www.becklawyers.com/case/ochsenbein-v-temp-right-service-inc
 
https://www.becklawyers.com/team/anthony-f-jackson
 
We think we should add this to our website.

title: Quick Changes
description:
Corey,
 
Thanks for the call today.  Sorry – I forgot what email you asked me to send this to.  Can you pass on to the right person on your team?
 
As discussed, let’s make these quick changes.  Once we have photos, we’ll be sure to send them to you.  There will also be other paralegals to add.  We can also discuss your recommendations based upon your recent findings – that was very interesting feedback where traffic is headed.
 
Quick Changes to Make:
 
  1. Add Clayton Parry as attorney (see attached biography to insert).  We can have the icon in place of his picture for now (same icon as what you used for Carolyn Martin).  We’ll get picture soon.
  2. Make attorneys same size as Michael and Mitchell and all attorneys at the top
  3. Add the following at the bottom of each attorney bio:
    1. Clint McAdams – Admitted to the Idaho Bar and Utah Bar.
    2. Mitchell Fielding – Admitted to the Arizona Bar, Idaho Bar, and Utah Bar.
    3. Michael Fielding – Admitted to the Texas Bar.
    4. Allison Capaul – Admitted to the Texas Bar.
    5. Clayton Parry – Admitted to the New Mexico Bar and Texas Bar.
  4. Remove Kristina Fowler and Izamar Espinoza – they are no longer with the firm. 
  5. We will add the other team members who have joined the firm recently in the next 1-2 weeks.
 
Thanks,
